scope: QIKVRT V45.11 real GitHub merge/commit/push/release with git bootstrap, origin-safe remote evidence
requirement: No GitHub state-changing effect before persisted Product Owner acceptance. The real-release CMD wrapper sets QIKVRT_ENABLE_REAL_GITHUB_EFFECTS only after this record is written.
effect_boundary: git fetch/checkout/pull, optional merge, commit, push, tag, GitHub release, asset upload, evidence publication
